g.title: SEM7
g.text: SEM-7 · Seminoma — Post Second-Line Therapy Management

g.title: r_none
g.text: No residual mass, OR residual ≤3 cm

g.title: action
g.text: OR resection of residual mass OR biopsy

g.title: note
g.text: Rare nonseminomatous elements on resection: if non-teratomatous, manage as viable seminoma.
